meta.title: Landing Kit Demo
meta.description: A demo landing page built with astro-landing-kit

props.title: Build landing pages fast
props.subtitle: Reusable components, pluggable content, zero boilerplate.

props.title: What you get
props.subtitle: Everything you need for a production landing page.

items.title: Astro + Svelte
items.description: Zero JS by default, islands for interactivity.

items.title: Content Providers
items.description: JSON, Directus, or bring your own.

items.title: SEO Built-in
items.description: JSON-LD, OG tags, sitemap, robots — all configured.

items.title: Dark Mode
items.description: System-aware theme switching out of the box.

items.title: Blog Ready
items.description: Optional MDX blog with tags, categories, RSS.

items.title: Can I use this with any Astro adapter?
items.description: Yes — SSG, SSR, hybrid. The kit is adapter-agnostic.

items.title: Do I need Directus?
items.description: No. The default adapter reads JSON files. Directus is optional.

items.title: Is the blog required?
items.description: No. Blog components are only loaded if you import them.

props.title: Ready to build?
props.subtitle: Clone the repo and create your first landing page in minutes.

props.title: See it in action
props.subtitle: Watch how to build a landing page from JSON in under 2 minutes.
